title: WhisperThresholdReached v1
description: Machine-readable schema for a threshold event indicating sufficient aligned whisper interest for association bootstrap.

threshold/id.description: Stable identifier of the recognized threshold event.

cluster/id.description: Correlation cluster identifier shared with later association proposals.

detector/node-id.description: Node that emitted the threshold event.

topic/class.description: Issue class for which critical mass was detected.

threshold/policy-ref.description: Reference to the threshold policy used for recognition.

participants/distinct-node-count.description: Number of distinct nodes that contributed sufficient aligned signals or interest.

participants/interest-count.description: Number of counted interest registrations in the cluster.

participants/trust-summary.description: Optional aggregate trust-tier or diversity summary.

bootstrap/candidate-node-ids.description: Candidate nodes from which a deterministic bootstrap subset may be derived.

disclosure/profile.description: Disclosure posture allowed at threshold crossing.
